hero.name: Johnny Fontes Rabelo
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: Building modern web experiences with cutting-edge technologies. Focused on creating performant, accessible, and beautiful applications.

frontend.label: // FRONTEND ARCHITECTURE
frontend.description: Senior Engineering focused on high-performance Angular ecosystems, micro-frontends, and industrial-grade UI/UX paradigms. Engineered for speed, scale, and semantic integrity.
frontend.proceduralUi: PROCEDURAL UI GENERATION USING CSS VARIABLES AND DYNAMIC LAYOUT ANCHORS.
frontend.reactiveCoreDesc: Deep expertise in asynchronous data streams using RxJS and NgRx. Mastery of Angular's evolution from Observables to the latest Signals architecture for atomic UI updates.
frontend.industrialUiDesc: Crafting high-fidelity components that balance aesthetic complexity with technical lightness. Utilizing Tailwind's utility-first paradigm to build scalable design systems.
frontend.developerUxDesc: Frontend isn't just for users; it's for performance. Implementing strict CI/CD linting, modular testing, and accessible patterns as a core development philosophy.

backend.label: —— SYSTEM_ENGINEERING
backend.description: Architecting high-throughput distributed systems using modular monoliths and microservices. Prioritizing clean architecture and decoupled patterns for infinite vertical and horizontal growth.
backend.apiGatewayDesc: Rate limiting, Auth, and Request aggregation via Envoy.
backend.solidCleanDesc: Strict dependency inversion to decouple business logic from framework concerns. Use of use-cases/interactors for predictable control flow and testability.
backend.cqrsEventDesc: Separating read and write models to optimize performance and maintain a granular audit log of every state change across the system.
backend.dddDesc: Modeling complex business logic into bounded contexts, ensuring high cohesion within services and loose coupling between them.
backend.quote: Scalability is not about handling more traffic; it's about handling growth without increasing complexity.

database.label: —— SUBSYSTEM: DATA INTEGRITY
database.description: Engineering high-performance persistence layers with atomic precision. Specializing in query optimization, multi-node orchestration, and seamless ORM integration.
database.optimizedSearchesDesc: Implementation of complex full-text search engines and fuzzy matching logic to reduce query times by up to 80% on large datasets.
database.advancedIndexingDesc: Strategic B-Tree, GIN, and GIST indexing strategies. Balancing write overhead with read performance for mission-critical applications.
database.proceduresTriggersDesc: Encapsulating complex business logic within the database layer using PL/pgSQL to ensure data integrity and reduce network round-trips.
database.prismaDesc: Leveraging type-safe database access to build resilient backends. I specialize in complex relational modeling, migrations, and automated seed scripting.

cloud.label: SPECIALIZATION_04
cloud.description: Engineering scalable, deterministic infrastructure through code. Bridging the gap between distributed systems architecture and operational excellence using modern cloud-native primitives.
cloud.deterministicEnvDesc: Eliminating configuration drift through immutable infrastructure principles and GitOps workflows.
cloud.jaegerTracingDesc: Distributed context propagation for high-latency bottleneck identification.
cloud.opentelemetryDesc: Vendor-neutral instrumentation across multiple service clusters.
cloud.grafanaDashboardsDesc: Customized SLI/SLO visualization for real-time fleet health.
cloud.projectADesc: Implementation of Tailscale mesh VPN within AWS private subnets for secure inter-region communication.
cloud.projectBDesc: Kubernetes-based dynamic provisioning for GPU-heavy training workloads with cost optimization logic.
cloud.projectCDesc: High-throughput data ingestion using Vector and Clickhouse for real-time security auditing.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I'm always interested in new opportunities and exciting projects. Let's discuss how we can bring your ideas to life.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

fullCycle.description: Deep expertise across the entire software stack. From pixel-perfect interfaces to distributed cloud infrastructure.
